## PR Checklist

- [ ] Pulled latest `main` before branching
- [ ] Checked content against the [style guide](../context-file-style-guide.md)
- [ ] New/moved files have a header (scope + "when to load")
- [ ] Subfolder `CLAUDE.md` updated if files were added, removed, or renamed
- [ ] `04-queries/INDEX.md` updated (if touching queries)
- [ ] No stale data - metric definitions, table names, and schemas match current source of truth
